scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/flow-core && npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w packages/connector
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/flow-core && npm run test -w apps/web && npm run test -w packages/connector
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/flow-core && npm run typecheck -w apps/web && npm run typecheck -w packages/connector
